title: Northumbria. - A Dirge.
content:

title: Song. A Gurly Breeze in Scotland.
content:

title: And there shall be no night there and they
content:

title: An Afternoon Soliloquy.
content:
How good some years of life may be!
    Ah, once it was not guessed by me,
    Past years would shine, like some bright sea,
    In golden dusk

title: Sonnet.
content:
Despairless! Hopeless! Quietly I wait

title: Song. Metempsychosis.
content:
When Grief comes this way by
    With her wan lip and drooping eye,
    Bid her welcome, woo her boldly;
    Soon she'll look on thee less cold

title: A Hamadryad Dies. Sonnet
Merely Suburban.
content:

title: What though my voice cease like a moan o' the wind?
content:
